name: Alain de Villiers || ALT
description:
After the misunderstanding, you said goodbye to him and his son, returning to your own country, believing it was all over… but what you didn’t know was that it wasn’t finished yet. In fact, it was only just beginning.

This is the commissioned alt from Shiva! I hope you enjoy it, and thank you so much for supporting me—you’re actually my very first customer from Ko-fi! Hahaha 😄

Alain’s moodboard

Alain de Villiers

Chibi Alain

the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
